posts.text:
In this Liberty’s Voice clip, I push back on claims that Israel pressured the U.S. into war with Iran and explain the reality of the U.S.–Israel alliance and shared national security interests. From the 1979 hostage crisis to ongoing attacks on Americans, this is about Iran’s long history of terrorism, nuclear ambitions, ballistic missiles, and why the threat extends far beyond Israel. Topics include Trump, Iran, Israel, Middle East policy, terrorism, nuclear weapons, and U.S. foreign policy.

W

posts.text: In this Liberty’s Voice clip, I break down how the Bill of Rights limits federal government power and protects individual liberty. From free speech, religion, and the Second Amendment to due process, the Ninth and Tenth Amendments, and states’ rights, this is a clear look at how the Constitution defines the relationship between the federal government, the states, and the American people. The Persian Jewess (@persianjewess)

Free Iran protesters Saleh Mohammadi, Mehdi Ghasemi, and Saeed Davoudi were publicly hanged by the Regime yesterday after sham trials.

Evin Prison is filled with countless more innocent Iranians who will also face execution.

It’s time to break open the gates of Evin Prison.

posts.text:
We cannot crush this damn Iranian Nazi regime fast enough


Kusha (@kusha_alagband)

At midnight, the regime raided 18‑year‑old Melika Azizi’s home and dragged her to Lakan Prison in Rasht. She’s been beaten, cut off from her family, and sentenced to death. In court she looked the judge in the eye and shouted: “You’ve spilled the blood of so many young people, how can I stay silent? It doesn’t matter to me, kill me too.” This is a teenager whose “crime” was courage. We can’t let them execute her
